# node-fixture-project

Copied from the Node cvetrace repo's fixture of the same name, for parity: pins
`minimist@0.0.8`, which is affected by
[GHSA-vh95-rmgr-6w4m](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vh95-rmgr-6w4m) /
[CVE-2020-7598](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2020-7598) and
[GHSA-xvch-5gv4-984h](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xvch-5gv4-984h) /
[CVE-2021-44906](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-44906) (both prototype
pollution). Used to verify `cvetrace scan` reports both known CVEs end-to-end.
